diff_summary: Adds one new test method test_succeeds_with_only_claude_code_session_id to TestWriteBulkCommitSentinelScript class. No files added, one file modified.

gitignore_coverage.reason: HARNESS_RULE tests/generated/ appears only in a .gitignore comment, not as an active gitignore pattern. Files under tests/generated/ show as untracked in git status despite the comment. Policy conflict: the comment states tests/generated/ is intentionally tracked, yet HARNESS_RULES expects it to be ignored. Requires a separate policy-reconciliation task.
gitignore_coverage.recommendation: Reconcile HARNESS_RULES in session-gitignore-propagate.sh vs the explicit tracking policy comment in .gitignore before changing any tracking behavior. Do NOT untrack tests/generated/ without a deliberate policy decision.

orphaned_subagents_detector_output.note: detect-orphan-agents.sh reported product-owner.md as orphaned — this is a FALSE POSITIVE. product-owner.md is referenced by commands/dev.md and commands/dev-overnight.md (verified). Detector does not scan dev-overnight.md references.

unreferenced_scripts_detector_output.note: detect-orphan-scripts.sh reported 17 items — all pre-existing, none introduced by this diff. Output contains duplicate symlink-resolved paths (/root/.claude = /dev/shm/dev-workspace/dot-claude). Per codex finding #2, excluded from changed-file issue totals. Listed here as baseline advisory only.

pre_existing_advisory.duplicate_content_note: detect-duplicate-content.sh found duplicates entirely within projects/ tool-result cache directories — pre-existing, not introduced by this diff, and not actionable without a cache retention policy.

summary.major_note: The 1 major finding (gitignore_coverage) is pre-existing and advisory only (introduced_in_diff: false); it does NOT block close.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex identified 6 issues with the draft findings: (1) orphaned_subagents false positive for product-owner.md — it IS referenced by commands; (2) 17 unreferenced_scripts items are out-of-scope noise with symlink duplicates; (3) duplicate_content in projects/ caches should not be in changed-file findings; (4) summary counters were ambiguous; (5) gitignore_coverage major severity is acceptable but any fix must not untrack intentionally-tracked tests/generated/; (6) naming rationale note about stale folder metadata.

findings.issue: orphaned_subagents contains a false positive. product-owner.md is referenced by commands/dev.md, commands/dev-overnight.md.
findings.proposed_fix: Remove product-owner.md from orphaned_subagents, mark as detector_false_positive with references. Do not archive/delete.
findings.rationale: Verified: grep confirms product-owner is referenced in commands/dev.md and commands/dev-overnight.md. Draft finding removed from orphaned_subagents and moved to pre_existing_advisory with false_positive annotation.

findings.issue: unreferenced_scripts 17 items is out-of-scope noise for --changed-files, and detector output includes duplicate realpaths via /root/.claude symlink.
findings.proposed_fix: Move to raw_detector_output/baseline_advisory with introduced_in_diff:false, dedupe by realpath, exclude from changed-file issue totals.
findings.rationale: All 17 reported scripts are pre-existing. Moved to pre_existing_advisory section and excluded from issue totals.

findings.issue: duplicate_content in projects/ tool-result caches is not a cleanliness issue introduced by this diff.
findings.proposed_fix: Exclude from changed-files findings or keep only as non-blocking baseline advisory. Do not propose deletion without a retention policy.
findings.rationale: projects/ caches noted in pre_existing_advisory. Not in findings arrays. No deletion proposed.

findings.issue: Summary is ambiguous: total_issues=1 conflicts with populated categories like orphaned subagents/scripts/duplicate content.
findings.proposed_fix: Use explicit counters: introduced_in_diff_issues=0, blocking_issues=0, and separate pre_existing_advisory counts.
findings.rationale: Summary restructured with introduced_in_diff_issues, blocking_issues, and pre_existing_advisory fields.

findings.issue: gitignore_coverage severity major is acceptable, but any implied fix to delete/untrack tests/generated/ would be unsafe because .gitignore documents it as intentionally tracked.
findings.proposed_fix: Keep as major, introduced_in_diff:false, advisory/non-blocking, and resolve in a separate policy task reconciling HARNESS_RULES vs the .gitignore comment.
findings.rationale: Recommendation updated to explicitly prohibit untracking tests/generated/ without a deliberate policy decision. Non-blocking flag set.

findings.issue: Naming rationale cites stale/conflicting folder metadata.
findings.proposed_fix: Keep naming_violations: [], justify as: new test method is valid snake_case, file path is pre-existing, Python tests in hooks/tests/ use lower snake_case.
findings.rationale: naming_violations remains empty. Rationale updated to note snake_case validation against pre-existing hooks/tests/ convention.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied all 6 codex findings: (1) removed product-owner.md false positive from orphaned_subagents; (2) moved unreferenced_scripts to pre_existing_advisory; (3) excluded projects/ cache duplicates from findings; (4) restructured summary with introduced_in_diff_issues and blocking_issues counters; (5) updated gitignore_coverage recommendation to block unsafe untracking; (6) updated naming rationale.
